_comment_personal: Personal local deployment — stdio, single client. The empty `args` relies on `kb-mcp.toml` being on the discovery path (CWD / .git ancestor / binary side). Drop this in your project root next to kb-mcp.toml, or point Claude Code at it via `~/.config/claude/.mcp.json`.
_comment_alwaysLoad: alwaysLoad: true is a Claude Code v2.1.121+ option that ensures kb-mcp's tools are present at initial load (skips tool-search lookup latency). Other MCP clients (Cursor, etc.) ignore the field. Drop it if first-startup model download cost outweighs the latency win.
